subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! Thou art He Who hath raised up the heavens by Thy command and established the earth through Thy will [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فسبحانک اللهم یا الهی انت الذی رفعت السموات بامرک و اسکنت الارض بارادتک و
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @transcendence; unknowability of God
